intro: KEY FEDERAL FIGURES — JULY 2026  (verify in the month of any transfer; Section 7520 and AFR reset monthly)

figures.label: Lifetime gift & estate tax exemption (2026)
figures.note: One Big Beautiful Bill Act (OBBBA) — permanent from Jan 1, 2026; indexed for inflation thereafter. Portability between spouses applies (federal only).

figures.label: Generation-Skipping Transfer Tax (GST) exemption (2026)
figures.note: NOT portable between spouses — allocate deliberately or it is wasted. See the GST Explainer tab.

figures.label: Top federal estate / gift / GST tax rate
Annual gift tax exclusion (2026)
figures.note: $194,000 annual limit for gifts to a non-U.S.-citizen spouse. Funds Crummey premium gifts to an Irrevocable Life Insurance Trust (ILIT).

figures.label: IRS assumed interest rate used to value trust (IRS Section 7520 Rate) — July 2026
figures.note: Rev. Rul. 2026-12. Resets monthly; for charitable interests you may elect the current month's rate or either of the two prior months'.

figures.label: Applicable Federal Rate (AFR) — July 2026, annual compounding
figures.note: Rev. Rul. 2026-12. Minimum rate for intra-family notes and Intentionally Defective Grantor Trust (IDGT) installment sales. Resets monthly.

figures.label: Rate rule of thumb
figures.value: HIGH Section 7520 rate: favors QPRT and CRT.  LOW rate: favors GRAT, CLAT, and intra-family notes
figures.note: Reprice before papering anything in a month the rate moves — July 2026's jump to 5.2% is exactly such a month.

states.body: No state estate tax. Top income rate 13.3% on trust/investment income. Does NOT conform to the Section 1202 QSBS exclusion — state tax applies regardless of stacking. Taxes incomplete-gift non-grantor (ING) trusts as grantor trusts since 2023. Throwback tax can reach accumulated distributions to CA beneficiaries. Prop 19 reassessment on parent-child residence transfers. Poor dynasty situs — use SD/NV/DE.

State estate tax: $7,350,000 basic exclusion (2026) with NO portability — each spouse must use it or lose it (the Credit Shelter Trust is the fix; see Situational Trusts tab). The cliff: exceed $7,717,500 (105%) and the ENTIRE estate is taxed, not just the excess. Taxable gifts within 3 years of death are added back for NY residents. ING trusts dead for NY residents since 2014. Follows the federal Section 1202 exclusion.

No state estate tax, no state income tax. Popular residency endpoint and trust beneficiary state. Powerful homestead creditor protection, but Florida is not a self-settled asset-protection (DAPT) statute state — use NV/SD/AK situs for that.

sources: Sources: IRS Rev. Rul. 2026-12 (July 2026 Section 7520 and AFR rates); IRS 2026 inflation adjustments and the One Big Beautiful Bill Act (OBBBA); NY Dept. of Taxation guidance for the 2026 basic exclusion. Cost figures are typical 2026 market ranges (Bay Area at the top of range) — confirm quotes. Reference lookup only — confirm structure, figures, and drafting with estate counsel and the client's CPA before implementation. Columns ordered most popular (left) to least (right).
